artifact: DirectLLM RCA: For Kolin, compare 1996 average post-transaction balance against the 1995 account-level baseline, then rank the segments with the largest negative shift. The strongest contributor is the account-frequency, age-band, or k_symbol segment with both a large balance decline and substantial transaction volume; avoid attributing the district decline to tiny segments.
sql: WITH tx AS (SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CAST(t.date AS DATE)) AS year, a.account_id, a.frequency, CASE WHEN 1996 - EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CAST(c.birth_date AS DATE)) < 30 THEN 'under_30' WHEN 1996 - EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CAST(c.birth_date AS DATE)) < 50 THEN '30_49' WHEN 1996 - EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CAST(c.birth_date AS DATE)) < 65 THEN '50_64' ELSE '65_plus' END AS age_band, COALESCE(t.k_symbol,'UNKNOWN') AS k_symbol, t.balance FROM trans t JOIN account a ON a.account_id=t.account_id JOIN disp dp ON dp.account_id=a.account_id JOIN client c ON c.client_id=dp.client_id WHERE a.district_id=5 AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CAST(t.date AS DATE)) IN (1995,1996)), agg AS (SELECT year, frequency, age_band, k_symbol, COUNT(*) AS tx_count, AVG(balance) AS avg_balance FROM tx GROUP BY 1,2,3,4) SELECT cur.frequency, cur.age_band, cur.k_symbol, cur.tx_count AS tx_count_1996, prev.avg_balance AS avg_balance_1995, cur.avg_balance AS avg_balance_1996, cur.avg_balance-prev.avg_balance AS balance_delta FROM agg cur JOIN agg prev ON prev.frequency=cur.frequency AND prev.age_band=cur.age_band AND prev.k_symbol=cur.k_symbol AND prev.year=1995 WHERE cur.year=1996 ORDER BY balance_delta ASC LIMIT 25;
